# processReport

**Instance Method**

Parses the contents of the specified report and updates the interface’s elements.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual void processReport(uint64_t timestamp, uint8_t *report, uint32_t reportLength, IOHIDReportType type, uint32_t reportID);
```

## Parameters

- **timestamp**: The timestamp of the report.
- **report**: A pointer to the bytes of the report.
- **reportLength**: The number of bytes in the `report` parameter.
- **type**: The report type.
- **reportID**: The unique ID associated with the report.

## Discussion

This method uses the provided report data to update the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects associated with this interface. Upon receiving a new report, call this method before you call the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDInterface/getElements] method.

## Getting and Setting Input Reports

- **ReportAvailable**: Notifies the interface that an updated report is available from the HID device.
- **AddReportToPool**: Adds a memory descriptor to the report pool.
- **GetReport**: Retrieves a new input report from the HID device.
- **SetReport**: Sends a report to the HID device.
